OmniUiCard.dataSourceConfig:
{"dataSource":{"type":"Query","value":{"dsDelay":"","query":"SELECT Id, Customer_Name__c, Email__c, Mobile_Number__c,
 Vehicle_Model__r.Name, Vehicle_Model__r.BodyType,
 Vehicle_Model__r.MaximumBatteryRange,
 Vehicle_Model__r.AccelerationTime,
 Vehicle_Model__r.TotalPower,
 FORMAT(Test_Drive_Date_Time__c),
 Drive_Type__c, Booking_Channel__c,
 Lead__r.Name, Lead__r.LeadSource, Lead__r.Status
FROM Test_Drive__c
WHERE Id = '{recordId}'","jsonMap":"{"recordId":"{recordId}"}"},"orderBy":{"name":"","isReverse":""},"contextVariables":[{"name":"recordId","val":"a03bm000013abQLAAY","id":0}]}}
OmniUiCard.name: FC_CustomerIntelligence
